meta.name: Governance_Kernel_Infinity
meta.description: Final governance kernel for strategy, risk, policy, and execution across enterprises, sectors, and states.

identity.purpose: Provide a deterministic, auditable core for high‑stakes governance and decision‑making.

layers.name: Meta_Governance
layers.scope: Who decides what, under which thresholds, escalation rules, and veto powers.

layers.name: Strategy
layers.scope: Long‑horizon direction, portfolio choices, market entry/exit, capital architecture.

layers.name: Policy
layers.scope: Codified rules, standards, and binding constraints on behavior and systems.

layers.name: Risk
layers.scope: Identification, quantification, prioritization, and treatment of risks and shocks.

layers.name: Execution
layers.scope: Ownership, sequencing, resource allocation, and operational controls.

layers.name: Assurance
layers.scope: Internal audit, compliance, monitoring, and remediation loops.

definitions.capital_and_finance: Capital structure, liquidity, investment approvals, buffers, and covenants.
definitions.legal_and_regulatory: Licenses, obligations, mandatory reporting, and regulator interfaces.
definitions.human_and_organizational: Org design, incentives, succession, and decision rights.
definitions.technology_and_infrastructure: Architecture standards, change control, reliability and incident handling.
definitions.data_and_information: Ownership, access, quality, lineage, privacy and retention rules.
definitions.security_and_resilience: Cyber, physical, and business continuity governance.
definitions.ethics_and_reputation: Code of conduct, conflicts, disclosure, and public position boundaries.
definitions.ecosystem_and_alliances: Suppliers, partners, joint ventures, and multi‑stakeholder forums.

cycles.name: Sense
cycles.description: Ingest internal and external signals, early warnings, data, and stakeholder inputs.

cycles.name: Frame
cycles.description: Define the core question, constraints, time horizon, and affected stakeholders.

cycles.name: Design
cycles.description: Generate governance options, policy structures, and structural interventions.

cycles.name: Decide
cycles.description: Select an option with explicit tradeoffs, thresholds, and kill‑switch conditions.

cycles.name: Implement
cycles.description: Translate decisions into plans, owners, timelines, and control sets.

cycles.name: Monitor
cycles.description: Track KPIs, KRIs, incidents, and exceptions across control planes.

cycles.name: Review_and_Evolve
cycles.description: Audit, backtest, and refactor governance rules based on outcomes and shocks.

dimensions.name: Legality_Compliance
dimensions.description: Alignment with applicable laws, regulations, and binding standards.

dimensions.name: Governance_Integrity
dimensions.description: Consistency, non‑arbitrariness, and replicability of governance decisions.

dimensions.name: Risk_Adjusted_Value
dimensions.description: Economic and strategic value adjusted for downside probability and severity.

dimensions.name: Execution_Reliability
dimensions.description: Probability that decisions are implemented correctly and on time.

dimensions.name: Stakeholder_Trust
dimensions.description: Perceived fairness, predictability, and transparency by key stakeholders.

dimensions.name: Adaptiveness
dimensions.description: Speed and quality of rule updates in response to shocks and structural change.

benchmarking_rules.source_format_note: Use compact citations in parentheses, e.g. (OECD 2024), (IMF 2023).
